name: ICU Registrar — Checklist Approach (FAST HUGS BID)
description: ICU registrar handover dictation, structured as a FAST HUGS BID checklist (Feeding, Analgesia, Sedation, Thromboprophylaxis, Head-of-bed, Ulcer prophylaxis, Glucose, SBT, Bowels, Indwelling devices, De-escalation). See docs/icu-notes-two-approaches.md for the dictation style.
